sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Is Robert Half (RHI) One of the Best Dividend Stocks Yielding at Least 7% According to Hedge Funds?
feed.summary: William Blair recently upgraded Robert Half Inc. (RHI) to Outperform, citing compelling risk/reward and early signs of improving sentiment among investors. The firm estimates about 40% upside for RHI in a base-case scenario over the next 12 months, with even greater potential in a stronger cyclical rebound. Robert Half's management provided Q1 2026 revenue guidance between $1.275 billion and $1.375 billion, and EPS between $0.20 and $0.30.

feed.title: PLLD Bond Price and Chart — SWB:PLLD
feed.summary: This article provides details on the Prudential Financial, Inc. 4.5% 15-SEP-2047 bond (SWB:PLLD) traded on the Stuttgart Stock Exchange. It includes key terms such as outstanding amount, face value, coupon, maturity date, and term to maturity. The article also offers a brief overview of Prudential Financial, Inc., outlining its segments and business operations.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean doubles down on its biggest cruise ships yet with two new orders
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has ordered two more Icon Class ships, named Icon 6 and Icon 7, to be delivered in 2029 and 2030, demonstrating their confidence in the mega-ship formula. These new orders signify a major expansion in their fleet, with the Icon Class ships proving highly popular since the debut of Icon of the Seas in 2024. The strategy focuses on creating distinct "neighborhoods" and catering to multi-generational appeal, leading to strong demand and profitability for the company.

feed.title: T. Rowe nabs coveted JP Morgan partnership, not long after signing one with Goldman Sachs -- both trace to its 2024 hire of model portfolios executive Josh Horesh from BlackRock
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price has secured a significant partnership with JP Morgan, following a similar collaboration with Goldman Sachs. Both partnerships are attributed to the firm's strategic hire of Josh Horesh from BlackRock in 2024, a known expert in model portfolios. This indicates T. Rowe Price's aggressive expansion in the model portfolio space through key talent acquisition.

feed.title: Is Deere (DE) Attractively Priced After Recent 21.6% Year To Date Gain?
feed.summary: Deere (DE) has seen a 21.6% year-to-date gain and is currently trading at US$567.69. Simply Wall St's analysis indicates the stock is undervalued based on a Discounted Cash Flow model, suggesting a 15.7% discount to its intrinsic value of $673.38 per share. While its P/E ratio of 31.85x is above the industry average, it is still below Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio of 39.86x, further suggesting it may be undervalued.

feed.title: Performance Shipping posts audited 2025 filing on SEC site
feed.summary: Performance Shipping Inc. (NASDAQ: PSHG) has filed its 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F with the SEC, covering the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The report includes audited consolidated financial statements and is accessible on both the SEC and company websites, with hard copies available upon request. Despite recent positive operational and financial news, the company's stock has historically shown flat or negative price reactions.

feed.title: PRICESMART (PSMT) EVP has 19 shares withheld for taxes on vesting
feed.summary: PRICESMART EVP Paul Kovaleski reported a small, tax-related share disposition where 19 shares of common stock were withheld to cover tax obligations on vesting restricted stock. The shares were valued at $162.15 each, totaling $3K. After this non-market transaction, Kovaleski directly holds 38,655 common shares in PRICESMART.

feed.title: Reverse stock split and board slate at Patriot National Bancorp (NASDAQ: PNBK)
feed.summary: Patriot National Bancorp (PNBK) is seeking shareholder approval for several key items at its 2026 annual meeting on May 20, 2026, including the election of seven incumbent directors, authorization of a reverse stock split, and ratification of Baker Tilly US, LLP as its independent auditor. The proposed reverse stock split, at a ratio between 1-for-10 and 1-for-20, aims to boost the stock's per-share price to meet Nasdaq's minimum bid requirement and enhance marketability. The company reported a 2025 net loss of $12.7 million and 117,085,713 common shares outstanding as of April 7, 2026.

feed.title: BlackRock (PEBK) files amendment reporting 259,426 shares (4.8%)
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13G reporting a beneficial ownership of 259,426 shares, representing 4.8% of Peoples Bancorp of North Carolina Inc. This filing indicates 256,021 shares with sole voting power and 259,426 shares with sole dispositive power, with an "as of" date of March 31, 2026, and a signature date of April 27, 2026. The amendment signifies a passive investment intent, providing transparency into BlackRock's adjusted position in PEBK.

feed.title: Pfizer (NYSE: PFE) director awarded 7,686 phantom stock units
feed.summary: Pfizer director Susan Desmond-Hellmann was granted 7,686.539 phantom stock units as part of her deferred board compensation. Each unit is linked to one share of Pfizer common stock, and this award increases her total holdings to 45,635.605 phantom units. These units will be settled in cash or common stock upon her retirement from the board, under Pfizer's Nonfunded Deferred Compensation and Unit Award Plan for Non-Employee Directors.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Honeywell (HON) After The Recent Share Price Pullback?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Honeywell International (HON) following a recent share price pullback, assessing its valuation through Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratios. While DCF suggests the stock is fairly valued, the P/E ratio indicates it might be slightly undervalued compared to its "Fair Ratio." The article also presents bullish and bearish narratives that lead to different fair value estimates, encouraging investors to align these with their own assumptions.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean orders Icon 6 and 7 at Meyer Turku
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has firmed orders for a sixth and seventh Icon-class cruise ship with Meyer Turku, scheduled for delivery in 2029 and 2030. This expansion is part of a long-term framework agreement securing shipbuilding capacity through 2036. The collaboration highlights the significant economic impact for Finland and the ongoing partnership between Royal Caribbean and Meyer Turku, which has built 25 ships for the company over three decades.

feed.title: Bell Textron Inc. bringing new MV-75 Cheyenne fuselage manufacturing jobs to Wichita
feed.summary: Bell Textron Inc. is establishing a new facility in Wichita, Kansas, to manufacture fuselages for the U.S. Army's MV-75 Cheyenne aircraft. This move is expected to create jobs and reinforce Wichita's role as a major aviation hub. The facility has the capacity to produce up to 48 fuselages per year, with work already started on the first six.

feed.title: Corteva says surplus steam is causing noise in Midland
feed.summary: Corteva Agriscience explained that noise heard by Midland residents is due to a surplus of steam from a seasonal drop in demand on the steam system serving the Midland I-Park. Corteva, which generates and distributes steam to other tenant companies in the Dow Michigan Operations Industrial Park, is working to implement additional noise-reduction measures. Dow confirmed it is in contact with the tenant company to understand the duration of the issue and resolution plans.

feed.title: Sequencing performance advances drive Pacific Biosciences of California to revamp SMRT Cell 101 resource
feed.summary: Pacific Biosciences of California has updated its SMRT Cell Sequencing 101 guide to reflect the latest advancements in its PacBio HiFi sequencing, including the integration of SPRQ-Nx chemistry. This revision provides an up-to-date view of sequencing capabilities in a single run. The company continues to focus on enhancing high-accuracy genomic analysis tools, previously launching the HiFi sequencing and Vega system for oncology and introducing new solutions for whole genome sequencing and cancer variant detection.

feed.title: Cathie Wood’s ARK sells Rocket Lab, buys Intellia stock
feed.summary: Cathie Wood's ARK ETFs have made significant trades, selling 50,312 shares of Rocket Lab Corp (RKLB) for over $4 million and continuing a pattern of divestment from the aerospace company. Concurrently, ARK made a substantial investment in Intellia Therapeutics Inc (NTLA), acquiring 263,848 shares valued at nearly $3.6 million, indicating a strong interest in gene-editing. Additionally, ARK sold 13,806 shares of Iridium Communications Inc (IRDM), marking a continued reduction in that holding as ARK reallocates investments towards emerging technologies and innovation.

feed.title: Semrush Holdings, Inc.(NYSE: SEMR) dropped from S&P Global BMI Index
feed.summary: Semrush Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SEMR) has been removed from the S&P Global BMI Index. This announcement follows several other recent news items concerning the company, including its unveiling of a new brand identity, Q4 earnings report, and insider share transactions. Semrush provides an online visibility management software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform, helping companies manage their online presence.

feed.title: The Icon Class Keeps Growing as Royal Caribbean Signs Off on Two More Ships
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has ordered two additional Icon-class cruise ships from the Meyer Turku shipyard, with deliveries expected in 2029 and 2030. These new vessels will be the sixth and seventh in the popular Icon class, reflecting strong demand. The announcement comes as the third Icon-class ship, *Legend of the Seas*, is currently undergoing sea trials.

feed.title: Schwab Charles R. co-chairman sells $6.58m in SCHW stock
feed.summary: Charles R. Schwab, Co-Chairman of SCHWAB CHARLES CORP (NYSE:SCHW), sold shares totaling approximately $6.58 million in two transactions in late April. The sales occurred at prices ranging from $90.0017 to $90.5012 per share, with the stock currently trading at $90.76. Despite these sales, Mr. Schwab retains a substantial indirect holding in the company, which is noted for its strong financial health and undervalued status according to InvestingPro analysis.

feed.title: ODD 2-WEEK DEADLINE ALERT: ODDITY Tech. (ODD) Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Investor Class Action- Hagens Berman
feed.summary: Hagens Berman has announced a securities class action lawsuit against ODDITY Tech. Ltd. (NASDAQ: ODD) after its American Depositary Shares dropped 49% due to an anticipated 30% year-over-year Q1 2026 revenue decline. The lawsuit alleges ODDITY made misleading statements about its AI-driven platform and failed to disclose an algorithm change by its largest advertising partner that significantly increased customer acquisition costs. Investors who suffered substantial losses between February 26, 2025, and February 24, 2026, have until May 11, 2026, to seek to become lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Schwab Charles R. co-chairman sells $6.58m in SCHW stock
feed.summary: Charles R. Schwab, Co-Chairman of Schwab Charles Corp (NYSE:SCHW), sold approximately $6.58 million worth of company stock through two transactions in late April at prices ranging from $90.0017 to $90.5012 per share. Despite these sales, Schwab retains a significant indirect holding in the company. The company currently trades at $90.76, with an attractive P/E ratio of 18.05 and a PEG ratio of 0.33, indicating potential undervaluation and strong financial health based on InvestingPro analysis.

feed.title: Will Earnings, New Debt and Governance Stances Change Wells Fargo's (WFC) Post‑Asset‑Cap Narrative?
feed.summary: Wells Fargo recently reported Q1 2026 results with increased net interest income and net income, alongside issuing new debt. The bank is also proactively addressing governance issues by urging shareholders to vote against several proposals at its upcoming annual meeting. These developments are set against the backdrop of the removal of its asset cap, influencing its investment narrative, though lingering regulatory and compliance challenges remain key watchpoints.

feed.title: Wren Kitchens Bankruptcy Tests Home Depot’s High Ticket Remodel Strategy
feed.summary: Wren Kitchens' bankruptcy has led to the closure of all its showrooms inside Home Depot, removing a key branded kitchen design and fitting option. This development challenges Home Depot's strategy for high-ticket remodel projects, especially as sales have been flat and recent stock returns mixed. The company will now need to find new partners or develop in-house solutions to maintain its kitchen offering and compete with rivals like Lowe's.

feed.title: Ventas (NYSE:VTR) Issues Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Expectations By $0.82 EPS
feed.summary: Ventas (NYSE:VTR) announced strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $0.94 EPS against a $0.12 consensus and reporting revenues of $1.65 billion. The company also raised its FY 2026 EPS guidance and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.52. Shares rose by 1.4%, and the stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) Issues Earnings Results
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) announced strong first-quarter earnings, beating analyst expectations with $1.96 EPS and $1.474 billion in revenue, leading to raised full-year 2026 guidance. The company launched a new agentic AI full-flow platform, AgentStack, and AI "super agents," alongside collaborations with Google and Nvidia, which are expected to drive growth in EDA consumption and new revenue streams. Despite strong operational performance and record backlog, the Hexagon acquisition is anticipated to be dilutive in the near term, and some metrics, along with insider selling, have led to mixed analyst attention.

feed.title: PINS Investor Alert: Pinterest Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Allegedly Inflating Business Resilience: Levi & Korsinsky
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has filed a securities class action lawsuit against Pinterest (NYSE: PINS), alleging the company misled investors about its business resilience between February 7, 2025, and February 12, 2026. The lawsuit claims Pinterest's promises of being "more resilient than ever" contradicted the reality of corrective disclosures, a workforce reduction, and significant per-share losses due to undisclosed tariff-related pressures on advertising revenue. Investors who experienced losses during this period are encouraged to contact the firm to potentially lead the class action.

feed.title: Waste Management (WM) Set to Report Q1 Earnings on April 28
feed.summary: Waste Management Inc. (WM) is scheduled to release its Q1 earnings on April 28, with analysts expecting an EPS of $1.74, a 4.2% year-over-year increase. The company holds a strong GF Score of 92/100, indicating robust long-term return potential due to high profitability and growth. However, insider selling and a moderate financial strength rating suggest caution for investors.

feed.title: ODD Investor Alert: ODDITY Tech Ltd. Securities Fraud
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert regarding a securities fraud lawsuit against ODDITY Tech Ltd. (NASDAQ: ODD). The lawsuit alleges that Oddity cultivated a false narrative of growth, concealing an advertising disruption that led to a significant stock drop. Investors who purchased shares between February 26, 2025, and February 24, 2026, may have grounds to recover losses and are encouraged to contact the firm.

feed.title: Caterpillar (CAT) Positioned for Long-Term Growth as Power Demand from Data Centers Surges
feed.summary: Caterpillar (CAT) is expected to benefit significantly from the surging power demands of data centers. The company's Power & Energy segment, which provides on-site power solutions, saw a substantial revenue increase and contributes to a growing order backlog. This trend is forecasted to continue as data center electricity demand is projected to rise by 200% by 2035, securing long-term service and maintenance revenue for Caterpillar.

feed.title: Pfizer Inc. (PFE) Files Form 8-K with SEC
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. (PFE) has filed a Form 8-K with the SEC on April 23, 2026, to provide essential updates and disclosures to investors and stakeholders. These filings typically contain information on financial performance, changes in corporate governance, or other significant corporate events, which are crucial for informed investment decisions in the pharmaceutical industry. GuruFocus.com offers further detailed information and analysis on Pfizer Inc. and its SEC filings.

feed.title: Organic social beats paid 13x on engagement as Hershey’s rewired, marketing intelligence stack exposes hidden performance; shift to real-time decisioning is US breakthrough for Mutinex
feed.summary: The Hershey Company is transforming its marketing strategy by moving from campaign optimization to a real-time, data-driven system with the help of Mutinex's Market Mix Modelling (MMM). This shift aims to improve decision-making speed and efficiency amidst growing channel complexity and consumer overload. Early insights reveal that organic social content can achieve significantly higher engagement than paid media, influencing how Hershey invests its marketing resources.

feed.title: IT Investor Alert: Gartner, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit -
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner management inflated growth projections for its Contract Value metric, which was a primary indicator for investors to gauge future revenue. The firm claims that despite management's assurances of acceleration, actual CV growth consistently declined, leading to significant investor losses.

feed.title: Novonix Issues 546,279 Unquoted Performance Rights Under Employee Incentive Plan
feed.summary: Novonix Limited has issued 546,279 unquoted performance rights under its employee incentive scheme, aiming to align staff interests with long-term shareholder value and retain talent. This move, while not immediately impacting quoted share capital, could influence future dilution and executive remuneration based on performance hurdles. Analysts currently rate NVX as a Buy with a price target of A$0.83.

feed.title: Elliott Management takes new stake in Hewlett Packard, exits Arm, among Q2 moves
feed.summary: Elliott Management made significant changes to its portfolio in Q2, acquiring a new stake in Hewlett Packard and completely exiting its position in Arm. These moves indicate a strategic shift in the hedge fund's investments during the second quarter.

feed.title: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) Faces Near-Term Pressure, but Analysts Still See Recovery Ahead
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) has experienced a decline in its stock value this year due to weaker-than-expected job reports, disappointing revenue guidance, and concerns about AI's potential impact on its business. Despite these pressures, analysts anticipate a long-term recovery for ADP, recognizing its broad range of services beyond payroll and its strategy to integrate AI into its offerings rather than compete with it. The company's cloud-based human capital management solutions serve over a million customers across various industries.

feed.title: Teradyne (TER) Valuation In Focus As Earnings Momentum And Estimate Upgrades Draw Investor Attention
feed.summary: Teradyne (TER) is heading into its earnings report with strong market expectations of 77.1% year-on-year revenue growth and significant recent share price momentum. While the stock trades above the average analyst price target, Simply Wall St's narrative suggests Teradyne is overvalued at $401.98 compared to a fair value estimate of $307.41, raising questions about whether the momentum aligns with underlying fundamentals. Key risks include weaker robotics demand and trade policy uncertainty.

feed.title: Should Upgraded Earnings Estimates Ahead of May 1 Report Require Action From Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Investors?
feed.summary: Analysts have recently upgraded earnings estimates for Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) ahead of its May 1, 2026 quarterly report, indicating higher expected revenue and profit. This positive shift is driven by growing confidence in Cboe's near-term earnings potential, reinforced by developments like the launch of the Cboe IBIT Volatility Index. However, investors are cautioned to consider the central risk of Cboe's reliance on its S&P index options franchise and to weigh various fair value estimates.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Orders Icon Class 6 and 7
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has confirmed an order for a sixth and seventh Icon Class ship from Meyer Turku, scheduled for delivery in 2029 and 2030. This expands their long-term agreement with the shipyard, securing shipbuilding capacity until 2036. The collaboration highlights a three-decade partnership that has seen Meyer Turku build 25 ships for Royal Caribbean, contributing significantly to Finland's economy.

feed.title: North American Construction Group Sets May 14 Conference Call on First-Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: North American Construction Group (NACG) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results on May 13, 2026, after market close, followed by a conference call and webcast on May 14, 2026. This event will allow investors and analysts to review the company's performance and outlook. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates NOA as Neutral due to weakening fundamentals, although it notes positive aspects like reiterated 2026 guidance and a reasonable P/E.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Raises MPLX Target to $63, Cites Strong Sector Momentum
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has raised its price target for MPLX LP to $63 from $55, reiterating a Buy rating due to strong sector performance driven by a shift to energy stocks and Middle East tensions. Barclays also increased its price target to $59, maintaining an Overweight rating. MPLX LP is a master limited partnership focusing on midstream energy infrastructure, specifically in crude oil, natural gas, and related product logistics.

feed.title: Pricesmart Inc (PSMT) Shares Fall 3.8% -- What GF Score of 88 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Pricesmart Inc (PSMT) shares dropped 3.8% to $154.99, putting the stock significantly above its GF Value™ estimate of $102.92, indicating it is overvalued. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 88/100, driven by high growth and momentum, the valuation score is a low 3/10, signaling a potential risk of price correction. Insider selling totaling $3.3 million over the past three months further suggests caution among company executives regarding the stock's current valuation.

feed.title: Barclays Downgrades Park Hotels & Resorts (PK), Sees Limited Upside
feed.summary: Barclays has downgraded Park Hotels & Resorts (NYSE: PK) to Equal Weight from Overweight, reducing its price target from $13 to $9. The firm cited relative valuation and the unlikelihood of the company completing its non-core asset sale program in 2026 as reasons for the downgrade, anticipating limited upside in the near to medium term. Park Hotels & Resorts, a lodging REIT with 34 properties, expects flat to 2% RevPAR growth and adjusted EBITDA between $580 million and $610 million for 2026.

feed.title: Anbio Biotechnology Calls May 15 Shareholder Votes on Sweeping Capital and Governance Overhaul
feed.summary: Anbio Biotechnology (NNNN) is holding shareholder meetings on May 15, 2026, to approve significant changes to its capital and governance structure. These proposed changes include a reduction in par value, a substantial increase in authorized share capital to introduce new Class C and preference shares, and a tenfold increase in voting power for Class B shares. The company also seeks authority for reverse share consolidations and stricter governance rules, all aimed at consolidating board and insider control while providing flexibility for future financing.

feed.title: PrimeEnergy (NASDAQ:PNRG) Director Sells $2,309,200.00 in Stock
feed.summary: PrimeEnergy (NASDAQ:PNRG) Director Clint Hurt sold 10,000 shares of the company's stock for $2,309,200 on April 24, reducing his position by 9.64%. Following this sale, Hurt directly owns 93,737 shares valued at over $21.6 million. The stock traded down 4.7% to $219.21, and the company reported $1.43 EPS on $50.06 million in quarterly revenue, maintaining a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts.

feed.title: Analysts’ Opinions Are Mixed on These Technology Stocks: WEX (WEX), Adobe (ADBE) and Cohu (COHU)
feed.summary: Analysts have issued mixed opinions on several technology stocks. Mizuho Securities maintained a "Buy" rating on WEX with a $170.00 price target, while Jefferies held a "Hold" rating for Adobe. Cohu received a "Buy" rating and a $55.00 price target from Jefferies, despite a consensus suggesting a downside from current levels.

feed.title: Profusa Announces PanOmics Assay Know-How Acquisition Agreement
feed.summary: Profusa Inc. has agreed to acquire Bio Insights LLC’s PanOmics Assay know-how for $30 million in Series A Convertible Preferred Stock. This deal, which excludes patent rights but includes an exclusive clinical validation sample license, aims to enhance Profusa’s multi-omics capabilities for drug discovery and precision medicine. The acquisition is structured with royalty payments, lock-up provisions, and is contingent on shareholder approval by September 30, 2026.

feed.title: PACS Group, Inc. Announces Retirement of Co-Founder and CFO Mark Hancock
feed.summary: PACS Group, Inc. announced the planned retirement of its co-founder and CFO, Mark Hancock, effective June 30, 2026. Mr. Hancock, who co-founded PACS in 2013, played a pivotal role in expanding the company from two facilities to 323 across 17 states, with 2025 revenues of $5.29 billion. He will continue to serve on PACS's Board of Directors as Vice Chairman, and Carey P. Hendrickson has been named his successor as CFO.

feed.title: PACS Group (PACS) CFO Carey Hendrickson submits initial Form 3 ownership
feed.summary: PACS Group, Inc. filed an initial Form 3 for Chief Financial Officer Carey P. Hendrickson, establishing his insider status. The filing, dated April 27, 2026, indicates no reported transactions, acquisitions, or dispositions of shares, serving as a baseline disclosure of his ownership. This Form 3 primarily serves to formally acknowledge his role as CFO and an insider, requiring future disclosures for any changes in his beneficial ownership.

feed.title: PACS Group Appoints New Chief Financial Officer Hendrickson
feed.summary: PACS Group Inc. has appointed Carey Hendrickson as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective April 27, 2026, succeeding co-founder Mark Hancock, who retires as an executive officer but remains vice chairman of the board. Hendrickson brings extensive public healthcare finance experience, aligning with PACS's growth strategy in the post-acute care sector. The transition balances continuity of the company's founding vision with new financial leadership to support its expanding operations and market position.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Trent Thad Sells 60,000 Shares of ON Semiconductor Corp (ON)
feed.summary: Trent Thad, EVP & CFO of ON Semiconductor Corp's subsidiary, sold 60,000 shares of the company on April 24, 2026. This sale is part of a trend where Thad has sold 170,000 shares over the past year with no purchases. The stock is currently trading at $96.5, with a market cap of $38.561 billion, and is considered significantly overvalued based on its GF Value of $58.38.
